Hero.name: Diego Rojas
Hero.description: Full Stack Developer focused on frontend, specialized in React, Next.js and TypeScript — creating modular architectures, secure systems and high-quality user experiences.

About.title: How I build software
About.subtitle: I focus on creating scalable, secure and maintainable applications, prioritizing user experience and code quality.

security.title: Security first
security.description: Implement robust authentication, access control (RBAC) and good practices to protect data and systems.

performance.title: Performance & UX
performance.description: Optimize applications to be fast, fluid and focused on a great user experience and reducing load times.

arquitecture.title: UI Modular Architecture
arquitecture.description: Design scalable systems with reusable components and maintainable code to facilitate growth and evolution.
